Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to build the project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-f1018ab1591f446ebbdba9a5bcf4c90b && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:debug.binlog 2>&1", "description": "Build Debug config with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-f1018ab1591f446ebbdba9a5bcf4c90b && dotnet build -c Release /bl:release.binlog 2>&1", "description": "Build Release config with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}
